OptionDescription.SourceString: When activating, stay unlocked, allowing other players to interact without needing keys. When this is set, you will need to reset the device via the 'Reset When Receiving From' receiver in order to lock the device again.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: When activating, stay unlocked, allowing other players to interact without needing keys. When this is set, you will need to reset the device via the 'Reset When Receiving From' receiver in order to lock the device again.
